settings.headline: Begin your Skinfluence evaluation.
settings.subhead: Start with a provider-reviewed intake designed to understand your goals, skin history, and treatment fit before anything moves forward.

settings.headline: What happens here
settings.body:
This destination should hand users into the real evaluation workflow once your intake, form, or external provider flow is ready.

  • Collect goals, history, and treatment context
  • Make it clear what information users will be asked to provide
  • Set expectations for provider review and next steps

settings.title: Share your background
settings.body: Users should complete the intake with the information needed for review, including skin goals and relevant history.

settings.title: Receive provider review
settings.body: A licensed provider reviews the submission to determine whether treatment is appropriate.

settings.title: Move into care if approved
settings.body: If approved, users move forward into the monthly treatment model and ongoing support experience.

settings.headline: Connect this page to your real evaluation flow.
settings.subhead: Once the intake or external evaluation experience is ready, point the theme’s evaluation URL setting here or directly to that destination.
